query: Get comprehensive company profile data for the company named "Triton Networks LLC". The company's official website domain is tritonnet.com — use this for disambiguation and to ensure you are searching for the correct company. Gather information from LinkedIn, G2, Reddit, and other reliable sources. Include company details, reviews, industry codes (UNSPSC, NAICS, ISIC), and market sentiment.
answer:
## Executive Summary
Triton Networks LLC (tritonnet.com) is a Dallas, Texas-based Competitive Local Exchange Carrier (CLEC) and Managed Service Provider (MSP) founded in 2006. Led by Founder and CEO Robert House, the company generates between $6 million and $9.8 million in annual revenue by providing consolidated voice, data, cloud, and security solutions to small and medium-sized businesses. The company differentiates itself by offering a single point of contact and consolidated billing for complex enterprise network deployments.

## Corporate History and Legal Standing
Triton Networks has evolved from a regional CLEC network service provider into a comprehensive managed network services provider [Managed Network Services | Triton Networks](https://tritonnet.com/). 

*   **Founding & Registration**: The company was officially filed as a Domestic Limited Liability Company in Texas on May 4, 2006, under file number 800650398 [Triton Networks LLC Exhibit A Articles of Organization & Certificate of Fact](https://www.icc.illinois.gov/downloads/public/edocket/453975.PDF). 
*   **Date Contradiction Resolved**: While some directories list the founding year as 2007, corporate records show a "Unanimous Written Consent of the Sole Member" signed on January 8, 2007, and a Certificate of Amendment filed on May 29, 2007, which likely accounts for the discrepancy [Triton Networks LLC Exhibit A Articles of Organization & Certificate of Fact](https://www.icc.illinois.gov/downloads/public/edocket/453975.PDF) [Triton Networks Business Solutions Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/triton-networks-business-solutions/60be6fe83b112d2d9880a77f).
*   **Expansion**: Triton Networks filed as a Foreign Limited Liability Company in Florida on May 22, 2017 (Document #M17000004357) and was approved to transact business in Illinois on June 5, 2017 [Detail by Entity Name - Division of Corporations](https://search.sunbiz.org/Inquiry/CorporationSearch/SearchResultDetail?inquirytype=EntityName&directionType=Initial&searchNameOrder=TRITONNETWORKS+M170000043570&aggregateId=forl-m17000004357-5f13a909-1e93-458e-a472-0baa42a002e4&searchTerm=TRITON+MIAMI+INVESTMENTS+LLC&listNameOrder=TRITONMIAMIINVESTMENTS+L130001076980) [Triton Networks LLC Exhibit B Certificate of Foreign Authority](https://www.icc.illinois.gov/downloads/public/edocket/453975.PDF).
*   **Locations**: The company is headquartered in Dallas, Texas. Associated addresses include 12700 Hillcrest, Suite 234, Dallas, TX 75230, and 12655 N. Central Expressway Ste 500, Dallas, TX 75243 [Triton Networks, LLC Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/triton-networks-llc/5a1daa1023000052009e83d0) [Detail by Entity Name - Division of Corporations](https://search.sunbiz.org/Inquiry/CorporationSearch/SearchResultDetail?inquirytype=EntityName&directionType=Initial&searchNameOrder=TRITONNETWORKS+M170000043570&aggregateId=forl-m17000004357-5f13a909-1e93-458e-a472-0baa42a002e4&searchTerm=TRITON+MIAMI+INVESTMENTS+LLC&listNameOrder=TRITONMIAMIINVESTMENTS+L130001076980).
*   **Corporate Identifiers**: The company operates under FEIN/EIN 20-4824953 [Detail by Entity Name - Division of Corporations](https://search.sunbiz.org/Inquiry/CorporationSearch/SearchResultDetail?inquirytype=EntityName&directionType=Initial&searchNameOrder=TRITONNETWORKS+M170000043570&aggregateId=forl-m17000004357-5f13a909-1e93-458e-a472-0baa42a002e4&searchTerm=TRITON+MIAMI+INVESTMENTS+LLC&listNameOrder=TRITONMIAMIINVESTMENTS+L130001076980).

## Leadership and Workforce
Triton Networks maintains a lean operational footprint, employing between 11 and 50 people [Triton Networks, LLC | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/triton-networks-llc). Recent data from 2026 indicates a specific headcount of approximately 11 employees [Triton Networks, LLC Information](https://rocketreach.co/triton-networks-llc-profile_b5efec35f42e7241). 

Key leadership includes:
*   **Robert House**: Founder and CEO [Robert House - Founder & CEO - Triton Networks, LLC | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/robert-house-320612358/) [Triton Networks LLC Exhibit C Management Biographies](https://www.icc.illinois.gov/downloads/public/edocket/453975.PDF).
*   **R. K. L.**: Executive Vice President [Triton Networks, LLC Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/triton-networks-llc/5a1daa1023000052009e83d0).
*   **C. H.**: National Director of Strategic and Partner Sales [Triton Networks, LLC Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/triton-networks-llc/5a1daa1023000052009e83d0).
*   **C. B.**: Controller [Triton Networks, LLC Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/triton-networks-llc/5a1daa1023000052009e83d0).

Financial estimates place the company's annual revenue between $6 million and $9.8 million [Triton Networks, LLC Information](https://rocketreach.co/triton-networks-llc-profile_b5efec35f42e7241) [Triton Networks - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/triton-networks-llc/348574138).

## Products, Services, and Operations
Triton Networks operates as a CLEC connected to regional and global carriers, ISPs, and cloud providers [Triton Networks LLC Staff Directory, Phone & Corp Office | Seamless.AI](https://seamless.ai/b/triton-networks-llc-17710051). 

**Core Telecommunications & Networking:**
The company specializes in Local & Long Distance Phone Service, Hosted PBX Solutions, SIP Trunks, PRI Trunks, and MPLS Networks [Triton Networks, LLC | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/triton-networks-llc). They also supply and manage network hardware, including firewalls, routers, and SDWAN devices [Acceptable Use Policy | Triton Networks](https://tritonnet.com/acceptable-use-policy/).

**Managed Security:**
Triton provides managed network security services encompassing monitoring, audits, firewall management, VPN configuration, and zero-trust security implementations [Triton Networks - Crunchbase Company Profile & Funding](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/triton-networks).

**Proprietary Platforms:**
*   **Triton One Solutions®**: A primary service platform for enterprise clients [Tech Thought Leadership by Triton Global | Triton Networks](https://tritonnet.com/thought-leadership/).
*   **Triton Connected Communities™**: An IoT-focused solution utilizing kiosks, sensors, smart devices, and M2M products. These endpoints connect to a central collector hub via Triton-controlled routers or SIM cards [Triton Connected Communities | Secure IoT Networks by Triton Networks](https://tritonnet.com/triton-connected-communities/).
*   **Omnichannel Experience Management (OXM)**: A platform used to deliver enterprise-grade omnichannel products [Triton Networks, LLC - Get the authenticated email list and contact details of the senior managers | Prospectoo](https://prospectoo.com/company/TritonNetworksLLC-2749927/).

## Industry Classifications
Triton Networks LLC is classified under the following industry codes:
*   **NAICS Codes**: 51 (Information), 517 (Telecommunications) [Triton Networks - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/triton-networks-llc/348574138).
*   **SIC Codes**: 48 (Communications), 489 (Communications Services, Not Elsewhere Classified) [Triton Networks - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/triton-networks-llc/348574138).
*   **Regulatory Classification**: Telecommunications carrier providing local exchange telecommunications service (under the Illinois Public Utilities Act) [Triton Networks LLC Exhibit A Articles of Organization & Certificate of Fact](https://www.icc.illinois.gov/downloads/public/edocket/453975.PDF).

## Market Sentiment and Employee Reviews
Triton Networks LLC maintains a modest digital footprint, with 170 followers on LinkedIn [Triton Networks, LLC | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/triton-networks-llc). 

Internal employee sentiment is highly positive. On Indeed, employees rate Triton Networks 4.7 out of 5 stars overall. Specific sub-ratings include 3.7 for pay and benefits, and 3.3 for work-life balance [Working at Triton Networks: Employee Reviews | Indeed.com](https://www.indeed.com/cmp/Triton-Networks/reviews?fcountry=ALL).

## Gaps and Limitations
*   **Industry Codes**: UNSPSC and ISIC codes for Triton Networks LLC were not available in the provided research data.
*   **Customer Reviews (G2/Reddit)**: While the research query requested G2 and Reddit reviews, the findings from these platforms pertained exclusively to similarly named but entirely unrelated entities (e.g., Triton DataCenter, OpenAI's Triton programming language, NVIDIA Triton Inference Server, Triton Digital, and Triton Investments). No verified customer reviews from G2 or Reddit regarding the Dallas-based *Triton Networks LLC* were present in the data.
